case_title: ALVIN GROSS VS. ALEX PASTEL DR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GROSS, ALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT PASTEL DR., ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ALVIN GROSS & DEFENDANT ALEX PASTEL, DDS. JULIE PASTEL WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED ON DR. PASTEL'S BEHALF. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED MAY-13-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PASTEL DR., ALEX
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROSS, ALVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PASTEL DR., ALEX STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GROSS, ALVIN
